---

## Overview

> A proprietary machine learning / ai system comprising 1242 integrated source modules.

**MirrorBody X** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Vite.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0505,stroke:#ff7b72,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d0a0a,stroke:#ff7b72,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#1a0505,stroke:#ff7b72,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#2d0a0a,stroke:#ff7b72,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#451010,stroke:#ff7b72,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
MirrorBody-X/
  LICENSE
  README.md
  index.html
  node_modules/
    .package-lock.json
  src/
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `JavaScript` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `1242` |
| **Frameworks** | `Vite` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>tweakpane</code>  <code>@mediapipe/pose</code>  <code>three</code>  <code>vite</code>
</p>
